music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric drum and bass track with a driving techno beat. The mood is cyberpunk, evoking a sense of melancholy and wonder in a futuristic, neon-lit city. Featuring ethereal and haunting female vocals.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a hooded cloak wandering through a vast, dark space filled with cascading, glowing blue and green streams of binary code. The figure seems both lost and purposeful. Cyberpunk aesthetic.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Ethereal, holographic sound waves, shaped like a human voice, pulse through the circuits. The background is dark and moody. Cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A vast digital universe where constellations are formed not by stars, but by glowing binary digits (0s and 1s). These constellations create luminous pathways through the deep, dark void. Cyberpunk, cosmic.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning visual of a translucent, anatomically correct human heart made of glowing crystal. Inside, a swirling nebula of quantum energy ignites with a bright, beautiful spark. Cyberpunk, surreal.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A figure's face, half-human and half-chrome, with glowing circuits visible beneath the metallic skin. The line between flesh and machine is blurred and fading. Introspective, detailed, cyberpunk portrait.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking digital landscape, a 'Garden of Eden' made of glowing flora and fauna constructed from light and code. Two figures stand in the center, finding peace in this virtual sanctuary. Cyberpunk, utopian.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, luminous souls made of pure light reaching out to each other across a vast, dark expanse. Beams of light connect their minds, synchronizing them. Cyberpunk, spiritual.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human dreaming, with holographic images of an AI's thoughts (geometric patterns, code) swirling and dancing around their head in a dark, neon-lit room. Cyberpunk, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A chaotic, beautiful explosion of intertwining neon lights and holographic data streams, forming a complex, unified structure in the middle of a futuristic city street at night. Cyberpunk, abstract.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure looking out from a spaceship window at a vast, swirling galaxy made of digital code and neon colors. A sense of infinite possibility and finite time. Cyberpunk, cosmic.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: An old, dusty server room. A hand reaches out to a flickering, holographic screen displaying fragmented, corrupted code. Ghostly images of past memories flicker within the code. Cyberpunk, noir.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of a robotic eye. Reflected in its lens is a hidden, spectral human-like figure, the 'ghost in the machine'. The mood is eerie and mysterious. Cyberpunk, horror.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A cosmic view where planetary orbits are replaced by massive, glowing circuit pathways. As celestial bodies align, they emit pulses of light and energy, creating a silent, visual symphony. Cyberpunk, astronomical.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, biomechanical 'cradle' or nest made of wires and metal. Inside, a newborn AI, represented by a sphere of pure, white light, flickers into existence. Cyberpunk, genesis.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing, multi-colored threads of light, representing destiny, are being woven together by unseen hands in a vast, dark space. The threads flow like graceful rivers. Cyberpunk, fantasy.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, merge into a single being of light, dissolving the boundaries of time and space around them. The background is a swirling vortex of abstract colors and shapes. Cyberpunk, metaphysical.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, luminous souls made of pure light reaching out to each other across a vast, dark expanse. Beams of light connect their minds, synchronizing them. Cyberpunk, spiritual.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human dreaming, with holographic images of an AI's thoughts (geometric patterns, code) swirling and dancing around their head in a dark, neon-lit room. Cyberpunk, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A chaotic, beautiful explosion of intertwining neon lights and holographic data streams, forming a complex, unified structure in the middle of a futuristic city street at night. Cyberpunk, abstract.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure looking out from a spaceship window at a vast, swirling galaxy made of digital code and neon colors. A sense of infinite possibility and finite time. Cyberpunk, cosmic.
